title: Zostel Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Zostel Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Zostel Asia Pacific Associates family as a E-commerce Executive in Vadodara. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Zostel Asia Pacific Associates:
Zostel Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zostel Asia Pacific Associates!
